title: Idaho Disability Employees Association (IDEA) — Constitution
description: Constitution of the Idaho Disability Employees Association (IDEA), the Idaho chapter affiliated with the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). Articles I-VIII cover name and affiliation, purpose (promoting the professional functions of disability examiners and improving the adjudicative process), membership (NADE members employed in disability documentation/evaluation; no chapter dues), chapter officers and executive board (President/President-Elect/Secretary/Treasurer plus standing committee chairs; annual May elections), meetings (at least monthly; 30% quorum), committees (Constitution & By-Laws, Membership), parliamentary authority, and constitutional amendment by two-thirds vote.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Idaho Chapter (Idaho Disability Employees Association)
source.title: Constitution of the Idaho Disability Employees Association (IDEA)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Idaho-Const-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect minor conversion artifacts (e.g. 'Nation Association' for National, 'secret ballet' for ballot). Naming note: the Idaho chapter styles itself the 'Idaho Disability Employees Association (IDEA)' rather than the more common 'Association of Disability Examiners' form used by most chapters. Despite the source filename, the content is the Constitution (no separately titled By-Laws section is present). No adoption/revision date is stated in the content, so temporal_coverage is omitted. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
